channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Boy driving truck crashes into group of monks, killing 8 and injuring 14
item.description: Police reported that the boy took his parents' pickup truck without permission, lost control, and struck the monks.

item.title: US will not renew trade agreement with Mexico and Canada from Trump's first term
item.description: The Trump administration announced it will not extend the USMCA, a major trade pact negotiated by President Donald Trump during his first term.

item.title: This July 4th could be the hottest on record in parts of the U.S.
item.description: Dangerous heat and humidity may push heat index readings from 100 to 115 degrees across the Midwest to the East Coast.

item.title: Empire State Building climbers expected in court on Thursday
item.description: Angela Nikolau and Ivan Kuznetsov face multiple charges following their climb, police said.
